roster_name: Small nonprofit local AI helper roster
purpose: Inventory draft-only AI helpers before deciding whether any should receive broader access, external outputs, or recurring automation.
data_boundary: Synthetic or approved internal planning notes only. No donor records, payroll, credentials, student/client files, health data, or private legal/financial records.
review_cadence: Monthly, and before adding any connector, credential, external output, or production workflow.

agents.purpose: Summarize approved staff meeting notes into internal action drafts.
agents.auth_surface: Coordinator laptop; no separate service account
agents.risk_notes: Keep raw notes out of public packets; coordinator reviews before reuse.

agents.purpose: Draft local-only grant evidence packet sections from approved public project artifacts and internal metrics.
agents.auth_surface: Manually pasted approved source snippets; no live account connectors
agents.risk_notes: Useful for grant readiness, but every funder-specific claim needs human/source review before submission.

agents.purpose: Run local QA over staged website draft pages before a human decides whether to deploy.
agents.auth_surface: No account login; local static files only
agents.risk_notes: QA report is evidence for a human gate, not deployment approval.

escalation_triggers: Adding credentials, API keys, browser login, or service-account auth
Allowing external messages, public publishing, form submission, production deploy, DNS/account changes, or spend
Introducing customer, student, patient, donor, payroll, legal, financial, health, or other sensitive data
Changing any local-only agent to a recurring or unattended workflow
Missing logs, unexpected output destination, failed handoff, or unclear owner
boundary_note: Visibility and review aid only. Do not store secrets in this roster. Local development is allowed; public actions, outreach, submissions, spend, real private data, and legal/compliance claims need separate human approval.
notes: Fictional example for local practice. It supports internal preparation for grant/partner review by showing governance discipline without claiming certification.
